title: Homelantor
description: A Homelander boss addon for TerminatorStar featuring advanced AI, hunting behavior, and powerful combat abilities.

# Homelander Addon for TerminatorStar (T*)
![Homelander fighting in water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9b74ac538fc5e494bef7fe6d879d7b5ab474f47.png)


**Homelantor** adds **Homelander** as a custom boss-style challenge for **TerminatorStar**.

This is an **unofficial fan-made addon**. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by *The Boys*, Amazon, Sony, DC, or any official rights holders.

## What does this mod add?

This addon adds a dangerous **Homelander bot** that hunts players and mobs with custom AI, boss behavior, visual effects, and destructive attacks.

Homelander is not just a normal bot. He can fly, search, chase, attack, and punish players who try to hide for too long.

## Features

Homelander can:

- Fly and chase targets at high speed
- Use eye laser attacks
- Break and burn blocks with his laser
- Grab players and mobs
- Drag targets across the ground with a ground-grab attack
- Search for hidden players from the sky
- Hunt mobs when no player is detected
- Create sonic boom and trail effects while flying fast
- Trigger a red warning sky before the fight starts
- Use boss-style health and custom fight phases
- React to sneaking, sound, invisibility, shields, and nearby mobs

## How to spawn Homelander

Spawn Homelander with:

```mcfunction
/homelander spawn
```

This spawns Homelander around the player and starts the warning phase before the real fight begins.

You can also spawn Homelander against a specific player:

```mcfunction
/homelander spawn <player>
```

Example:

```mcfunction
/homelander spawn Steve
```

In multiplayer, this makes Homelander **start** by targeting that player. However, he can still react to other players if they are detected, make noise, become closer, or become easier targets.

## How to remove Homelander

Remove active Homelander bots with:

```mcfunction
/homelander remove
```

## Commands

### Main commands

```mcfunction
/homelander spawn
/homelander spawn <player>
/homelander remove
/homelander warningtime <seconds>
```

### Warning time

You can change how long the warning phase lasts before Homelander starts hunting.

```mcfunction
/homelander warningtime <seconds>
```

Example:

```mcfunction
/homelander warningtime 60
```

This sets the warning phase to **60 seconds**.

## Force attacks

You can force Homelander to use some of his attacks with commands.

```mcfunction
/homelander laser
/homelander grab-attack
/homelander ground-grab
```

You can also use the attack command group:

```mcfunction
/homelander attack laser
/homelander attack grab
/homelander attack ground_grab
/homelander attack ground-grab
/homelander attack mob_burst
/homelander attack mob-burst
/homelander attack laser_sweep
/homelander attack laser-sweep
/homelander attack mob_sweep
/homelander attack mob-sweep
```

## How do I hide from Homelander?

Sneaking makes it harder for Homelander to hear and detect you.

However, sneaking does **not** make you completely safe. If Homelander cannot find you, he can search from the sky and scan the area until he finds a target.

To survive longer:

- Sneak when possible
- Avoid making noise
- Use cover
- Keep moving carefully
- Do not stay in the open for too long

## Shield interaction

Homelander's laser can be blocked with a shield.

Blocking the laser may reflect it back, but your shield will take heavy durability damage while doing so.

You can craft better Shield that have more durability for living longer against Homelander![craft of the new shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cd502c7391bcd31330f9330e661e39f281e604a.gif)

## Requirements

This addon requires:

```text
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
TerminatorStar (T*)
```

## Recommended use

This mod is made for players who want a boss-style manhunt challenge.

Spawn Homelander, survive the warning phase, then try to escape, hide, or fight back while he hunts you with lasers, flight, grabs, and destructive attacks

## Alpha version

This mod is currently in alpha. Bugs may occur. If you encounter issues, please report them on the official Discord server.
